COLLAB: SUNDARBANS X NALLAMALA X CORBETT X PRAVAHA X BOUNDLESS TRAVEL SOCIETY
Summary:
What an amazing evening full of dance, music, and laughter! Our Dandiya meetup brought everyone together to celebrate culture, friendship, and the joy of the festive spirit. From vibrant dance moves with colorful sticks to the infectious beats that had everyone on their feet, it was truly a night to remember.
 
 A huge thank you to everyone who joined, made it lively, and spread so much energy.

We started the day on a delicious note with lunch at Dumatara Restaurant — laughter, good food, and lots of chatter set the perfect vibe for the day. 
 
 After recharging, we headed to the magnificent Chowmahalla Palace, Hyderabad, and wow — every corner was a photographer’s dream! From intricate architecture to stunning courtyards, we clicked, explored, and soaked in the history and grandeur of this beautiful palace. 
 
 It was amazing seeing everyone’s unique perspectives through the lens, sharing tips, and capturing candid moments. The day was a perfect mix of food, friendship, creativity, and memories that we’ll cherish.

This Children’s Day, we had the privilege of celebrating with some incredible underprivileged children at a local labour site. 
 
 We organized three fun games, cheered them on, and distributed prizes, making sure every child felt special.Beyond the fun, we shared a few valuable life lessons through stories, hoping to inspire and encourage them in small but meaningful ways. 
 
 After the celebrations, the volunteers headed to the mall to unwind and reflect on the beautiful day, cherishing the smiles, laughter, and unforgettable moments we shared with the children.

We had an action-packed day organizing a badminton tournament as part of the Rastriya Khel Mahotsav! From the first serve to the final point, the courts were alive with energy, fast-paced rallies, and some seriously competitive matches. Every participant gave their best, and the atmosphere was full of fun, cheers, and friendly competition. 
 
 To keep everyone refreshed and energized, we provided drinks for all the players, which helped maintain the pace and added to the enjoyment of the day.
